sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_users (id UInt32, name String, mail Nullable(String), phone Nullable(String), telegram Nullable(String));
INSERT INTO test_users (id, name, mail, phone, telegram) VALUES (1, 'Alice', NULL, '123-456-7890', NULL);
INSERT INTO test_users (id, name, mail, phone, telegram) VALUES (2, 'Bob', NULL, NULL, 'bob_telegram');
SELECT id, name, coalesce(mail, phone, CAST(telegram AS Nullable(String))) AS contact_info FROM test_users;
UPDATE test_users SET mail = 'alice@example.com' WHERE id = 1;
